name: the-vault
description: A local-first AI memory operating system for coding agents and humans
author: Ali Saad

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @the-vault/core build && pnpm --filter @the-vault/cli build && pnpm --filter @the-vault/mcp-server build && pnpm run deploy:mcp && pnpm --filter @the-vault/desktop build
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @the-vault/core build && pnpm --filter @the-vault/cli build && pnpm --filter @the-vault/mcp-server build
